allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([a for a in d['artifacts']]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['instruction']\); print\('---TEMPLATE---'\); print\(d['template']\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['instruction']\); print\('---TEMPLATE---'\); print\(d.get\('template',''\)\); print\('---OUTPUT---'\); print\(d.get\('resolvedOutputPath'\)\)")
